evals.prompt: I need to start developing locally. Set up my entire development environment with the SSH tunnel to the remote database and start all the Docker services so I can begin working.
evals.expected_output: The skill should validate prerequisites, read POSTGRES_HOST from .env, open an SSH tunnel in background to 0.0.0.0:5432, start docker-compose services, and display a summary with all service URLs and status.

evals.prompt: My local development environment isn't set up yet. I want to initialize everything - the SSH tunnel for database access, backend, frontend, and all other services. Please set it up for me.
evals.expected_output: Same as eval 1 - complete environment setup with SSH tunnel, docker-compose, health checks, and status display.

evals.prompt: Can you get my dev stack running? I need the SSH tunnel to the database open and all containers started so I can test the application locally.
evals.expected_output: Same setup workflow: validate, extract POSTGRES_HOST from .env, tunnel, docker-compose, health checks, and final status.
